title: Copy-on-Write Process Flow
description: A flowchart illustrating the sequence of events when a child process attempts to write to memory shared with its parent process.
elements: Parent Process with Private Memory Pages
relationships: Parent forks a child, sharing read-only pages
Child attempts to write to a shared page
Kernel traps the write attempt (page fault)
Kernel allocates a new copy of the page for the child
Kernel updates child's page table to point to new writable copy
Child's write operation completes on its private copy
